reviewer_manifest.dispatch: claude-code Agent tool, default agent type, persona inline, isolated context (cumulative diff + feature docs only)

findings.title: Store-global cycle refusal blocks unrelated cell writes (contradicts locked D2)
findings.evidence: lib/cells.mjs assertNoCycle unioned ALL on-disk cells; reproduced: featureA cycle refused unrelated featureB add
findings.resolution: refusal scoped to cycles intersecting incoming ids; regression test added; test_lib 334/0; mirrors byte-identical

findings.title: Operative Codex spawn doc teaches retired API; ORCH-01 census red and unwired in verify
findings.evidence: swarming-reference.md:120,123,125 agent_type/fork_context/re-spawn; census exits 1, absent from commands.verify
findings.resolution: table rewritten to ORCH-01 API; census green and appended to verify (suite #16); projections synced

findings.title: Cycle-refusal guard has cross-session TOCTOU: concurrent sessions can co-commit a cycle
findings.evidence: assertNoCycle read-check-write without lock; schedule diagnostics remain the durable backstop

findings.title: Runtime dispatcher .bee/bin/bee.mjs has no template-parity guard (PROJ-08 hazard)

findings.detail: Fix 1 (cycle scope): filter proven complete — every write-introduced cycle intersects incoming ids; regression test fails on old code; mirrors byte-identical; 334/0. Fix 2 (ORCH-01 doc+census): table matches SPEC exactly; census exit 0; wired as verify suite #16; 3 copies identical. Class-1 sweep (overly-global write guards): clean. Class-2 sweep (dormant enforcement artifacts): one pre-existing item — test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs unwired (filed P3).

findings.title: test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs is dormant — end-to-end hook integration test not wired into verify
findings.evidence: skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs absent from commands.verify and not imported by any suite; pre-existing, not a regression of this session

uat.items: all SEE/CALL/RUN decisions across the 7 features in scope

decision.note: Both promoted P1s fixed in-session (parallel-scheduler-5, codex-harness-hardening-6), delta re-review PASS, defect-class sweeps clean; full 16-suite verify green after fixes. UAT items skipped under total autopilot with recorded reason.
